target:
(…No good.
This… This can't be made real…)

What will you do?
Mio will die.

Y-You… stop!!!
What are you… going to do…??
Don't touch her!!!

You want to eat people!!!
Then eat me!!!

I won't take the bait.
Trying to die heroically is pointless.

(The right eye…!
The eyeball was pulled out…!!!)

Ushio.
The wild stray said it was degraded.
I don't think that could beat Negoro.

You're the opposite of degraded…
You've actually "grown"!!!

I just don't want to erase you…
I'll use your head properly tomorrow.

I don't want to disappear…
I don't want to… disappear…
(The eyes stolen by Haine have returned!?)

Tch!
It's impossible to erase his power…

Which came first, the egg or the chicken?
The causality forms a loop!!!
Cheater…!

…Your right eye…
It can view the flow of time from a higher dimension,
and observe multiple parallel worlds.

And Shinpei-kun.
You have the power to make the worlds you observe into "facts".
This world is currently being described by you.

It's a terrifying godly power.
However, fortunately,
you haven't mastered its use yet.

It's an incomplete thing that only works
when "death" - the disappearance of self-awareness - occurs.

So in short,
just don't kill you until the end.

(…So… that's it…
You know! 
My loop…!!)

(Why!?
Unlike "last time", "this time" I haven't been copied…
!?)

Until tomorrow ends,
you just need to stay here and breathe.
While in despair.

(If the loop doesn't happen,
there's nothing I can do.
I can't redo this again…)

(I'll break my promise again…
…I can't protect anyone…)

I'm sorry… Mio…
I'm sorry… Ushio…

(No… it's not over yet!
There's still… a plan…!!)

(The chance to use 'that' is only a moment…
I'll definitely… definitely not miss it!!!)

…Yikes!! 
Are you in the middle of a capture??

Dangerous, dangerous…
I was about to kill Shinpei-kun.

You shot off my arm by surprise, freeing Shinpei-kun…
Then you tried to shoot him to loop him.

But regretfully,
I can't let you kill Shinpei-kun now.

Anyway, the cleanup is complete…
Now no one will interfere with us…

(The arm is repairing…!
Ryunosuke-sensei and Totsumura…
They risked their lives for me…)

Sorry, Shinpei-kun.
This time… it's game over.

Stop!!! 
Don't… let go of Shinpei!!!

Give up.
It's too late… everything…

Everything was in vain.
The chance, the hints… the lives of important people.

But don't worry.
I'll guarantee Shinpei-kun's life.
Until everything is over, of course.

(…Somewhere far away…
I can hear Ushio's scream…)

Gaa…
Thanks to you… I could finally drink…

If one of us dies or gets an irreversible injury…
I'll immediately loop and redo it.

You mean you'll kill yourself?!
How?!
I'll have Ushio cut my neck.

It'll be instant, no pain,
and most importantly, it'll definitely kill me…!!!
It's all good!

If I can't move, I'll have to do it!
If I can't move…

Ah!!!
You brought… mercury?!
You really did!!!

How long will this poison take?
What's the lethal dose?
…Even one drop dissolved in water is bad…!!!
Then if I drink all of it, I'll definitely die?
Ah… I hope I don't have to use it…

Poison…?
To drink something like this without hesitation…
You're used to dying, aren't you?

…I can't believe it, Shinpei-kun.
Have you been here this many times?

…Fufu…
First time, I'm so relaxed… you bastard…!!!

…Huh.
I didn't expect such determination.
I won't look down on you just because you're a child…

No matter how many times!
You hear me!!!
I'll redo it no matter how many times!

And finally… I'll defeat you!!!
I'll definitely…!!!

How long will you keep that relaxed…?
You can't just knock me out…!!!

It's too late…
I'm sorry, Haine…

Look… this one…
You've been pushing back my invasion…

Shinpei…!!!
He's risking his life…!!!
You can't sleep now…
